nodes.label: Five Locks
nodes.definition: Assumption-based reread keys; each read unlocks deeper Recognition.

nodes.label: Reader as sixth protagonist
nodes.definition: The reader is the missing piece; the book does not change—the reader does.

nodes.label: Antagonist: Certainty
nodes.definition: The villain is not a person but the force of premature certainty.

nodes.label: Unconfirmed chronology
nodes.definition: Published chapter order follows causality/thematic chain, not time.

nodes.label: Five protagonists fork A/B
nodes.definition: Fork between five POV protagonists vs other structural options.

nodes.label: Memory not time (apex)
nodes.definition: Possible apex truth: memory—not time—is the hidden axis.

nodes.label: Guliver of Mars pillar
nodes.definition: 1905 prototype: magic transit, dream Mars, romance.

nodes.label: Princess of Mars pillar
nodes.definition: 1912 perfected planetary romance: atlas world, honor, series canon.

nodes.label: Buck Rogers pillar
nodes.definition: 1928 tech-future, resistance, hard SF grammar.

nodes.label: Flash Gordon pillar
nodes.definition: 1934 cinematic space opera: Mongo, Ming, serial swashbuckle + SF.

nodes.label: Star Wars pillar
nodes.definition: 1977 mythic synthesis: galaxy, Force, hero's journey recombination.

nodes.label: Recursive novel
nodes.definition: Story engineered so each reread retroactively rewrites prior pages.

nodes.label: Story Engine
nodes.definition: Container for compile workflow: bibles, timelines, locks before prose.

nodes.label: Chronology Lie
nodes.definition: Reader assumes chronological chapters; actual order is causal/thematic.

nodes.label: Time anchors
nodes.definition: Tiny fair-play temporal clues per chapter; meaningless until reread.

nodes.label: Five time fractures
nodes.definition: Five genre pillars map to five temporal fracture layers.

nodes.label: Watchmaker phases
nodes.definition: Nine pre-writing phases; Chapter One is Phase 9 (last).

nodes.label: Chapter One last
nodes.definition: Do not write opening chapter until hidden engine is complete.

nodes.label: Document preservation doctrine
nodes.definition: Conversations are archive; documents are the operating system.

nodes.label: Ten bibles hierarchy
nodes.definition: Foundational document map before any prose.

nodes.label: Master Canon (not Story Bible)
nodes.definition: Master Canon governs all decisions; Story Bible is one section.

nodes.label: Book of Secrets
nodes.definition: Author-only apex layer; compile gate for all prose.

nodes.label: Golden Rule / First Law
nodes.definition: Never lie to the reader; fair play above all.

nodes.label: Visibility vs importance
nodes.definition: What reader sees ≠ what matters; hundreds of tiny certainties.

nodes.label: Reader changes not book
nodes.definition: Text is fixed; meaning evolves through Recognition passes.

nodes.label: Puzzle second novel first
nodes.definition: Primary commercial risk: puzzle before character/story.

nodes.label: Three-level success model
nodes.definition: First read · hook · discussion tiers for commercial+creative success.

nodes.label: Story wins rule
nodes.definition: Best adventure story framing; hidden engineering invisible.

nodes.label: 7/10 organic reread
nodes.definition: Internal success metric: 7 of 10 readers reread without prompting.

nodes.label: Recognition not twist
nodes.definition: Five Recognition moments, not shocks; meaning reframes.

nodes.label: Sixth Sense benchmark
nodes.definition: Fair-play recontextualization: same facts, new meaning.

nodes.label: Crash convergence
nodes.definition: Separate threads converge into one interconnected mechanism.

nodes.label: Butterfly small moments
nodes.definition: Tiny choices ripple across time; small moments carry weight.

nodes.label: Meaning in interpreter
nodes.definition: Meaning-making not puzzle-solving; invitation ending.

nodes.label: Opening as continuation
nodes.definition: Opening reads as continuation of reader's prior life.

nodes.label: First/last sentence dyad
nodes.definition: Opening completes ending thought; grammatically incomplete final line; continuous not circular.

nodes.label: Experience is product
nodes.definition: The reading experience—not the book object—is the product.

nodes.label: Give it away / admire reader
nodes.definition: Generosity model; novel invites reader to admire their own discovery.

nodes.label: Originality firewall
nodes.definition: Borrow techniques; never plots, characters, planets, dialogue.

nodes.label: CHRONOFORGE codename
nodes.definition: Creative codename; GitHub repo is CanonForge.

nodes.label: GitHub governance
nodes.definition: Private repo; one commit per step; H:/ local truth.

nodes.label: Knowledge OS
nodes.definition: Institutional ingest layer before Phase 14 prose.

nodes.label: LOST breadcrumbs (finite)
nodes.definition: Finite fair clues; meaning shifts with context.

nodes.label: Movements not chapters
nodes.definition: Eliminate chapters entirely; invisible movements with emotional frequency; river not stairs.

nodes.label: Experience success scene
nodes.definition: Finish → silence → reopen → text 3 people before page five.

nodes.label: Conversation architecture
nodes.definition: Build for reader-to-reader discovery dialogues; shared human experience.

nodes.label: Earned not demanded reread
nodes.definition: Second read must be earned, never demanded; no layer hints.

nodes.label: Authorship as philosophy
nodes.definition: Anonymous/pseudonymous authorship removes author from reader conversation—not a gimmick.

nodes.label: Remove author from conversation
nodes.definition: Readers cannot escape into author intent, interviews, or confirmations.

nodes.label: Minimal title page
nodes.definition: Title page: CHRONOFORGE only—no author, bio, endorsements, or read-twice hints.

nodes.label: Ending silence
nodes.definition: Final page: 'Begin again.' or nothing—silence as part of ending.

nodes.label: How did this book know
nodes.definition: Target reader reaction—not 'who wrote this?' but 'how did it know I would think that?'

nodes.label: Teaches how to reread
nodes.definition: Novel teaches rereading of books, memories, assumptions, and lives—not merely a rereadable novel.

nodes.label: Invisible reader contract
nodes.definition: Reader assumes beginning-to-end; novel silently subverts—never stated, never hinted.

nodes.label: Opening mid-sentence
nodes.definition: First page begins inside a sentence; book feels already in progress—no Chapter One.

nodes.label: Continuous not circular
nodes.definition: Final thought completes on page one; novel is continuous, not merely circular.

nodes.label: No beginning law
nodes.definition: The book has no beginning; the reader chooses where to enter the loop.

nodes.label: Copyright invisible to reader
nodes.definition: Legal copyright exists in metadata; not part of reading experience.

nodes.label: No chapters
nodes.definition: Chapters tell reader where they are; remove this orientation tool entirely.

nodes.label: Understanding not progress
nodes.definition: Reader measures understanding, not percentage-through-story.

nodes.label: Memory transitions
nodes.definition: Scene shifts via sentence continuity; feels like remembering.

nodes.label: River not stairs
nodes.definition: Continuous flow—current not stop-start; novel as river.

nodes.label: Invisible movements
nodes.definition: Emotional-frequency shifts felt, never labeled.

nodes.label: Cadence acceleration
nodes.definition: Each movement subtly faster: sentence, paragraph, dialogue, description density.

nodes.label: No page numbers
nodes.definition: Remove page numbers; Möbius-strip artifact; publication feasibility TBD.

nodes.label: White space as punctuation
nodes.definition: White space is only shift cue—silence, breath, reflection.

nodes.label: Artifact not novel
nodes.definition: Design printed artifact; every physical aspect reinforces experience.

nodes.label: Form supports experience
nodes.definition: Form quietly supports; never overwhelms; Read 1 must remain inviting adventure.

nodes.label: Compose not write
nodes.definition: Book is scored not written; composer asks if note belongs here.

nodes.label: Rhythm Bible
nodes.definition: Score document: tempo, pulse, silence, density, cadence per page.

nodes.label: White space as rest
nodes.definition: White space is musical rest; meaning shifts across Recognition reads.

nodes.label: Emotional meter map
nodes.definition: Internal meters per state: wonder 3/4, conflict 5/4, memory free time, etc.

nodes.label: Heartbeat pulse
nodes.definition: Recurring three-short-sentences pause pattern; measures something on Read 4+.

nodes.label: Breathing as instrument
nodes.definition: Compose for breathing, pulse, subvocalization—not eyes alone.

nodes.label: Violated expectation emotion
nodes.definition: Emotion from expectation violated—not adjective density.

nodes.label: Symphony disguised as novella
nodes.definition: Actual medium: symphony in novella form—not genre label.

nodes.label: Compose Laws
nodes.definition: Six-line center doctrine: word, sentence, paragraph, page, silence, reread.

nodes.label: Rhythm anti-skimming
nodes.definition: Rhythm not complexity stops skimming; prediction failure slows reader.

nodes.label: Silence as content
nodes.definition: Unwritten parts as important as written; silence is part of music.

nodes.label: Visual Grammar
nodes.definition: Typographic language document; one canonical meaning per instrument.

nodes.label: Invisible typographic score
nodes.definition: Typography as emotional score—not decoration; never pulls reader out.

nodes.label: Canonical typographic meanings
nodes.definition: Roman=observed; italic=believed; bold=objective leaking; small caps=immutable truth.

nodes.label: Typography marks reality
nodes.definition: Visual grammar marks how reality behaves—not who speaks.

nodes.label: Limited visual vocabulary
nodes.definition: One typeface; italics; bold; small caps; space; indent; dashes; ellipses only.

nodes.label: Voice via page breathing
nodes.definition: Distinct voices via paragraph rhythm—not font changes.

nodes.label: Typography rarity
nodes.definition: If everything accented nothing accented; cymbal crash principle.

nodes.label: Typographic Recognition
nodes.definition: Formatting never lies; reader assigned wrong conventional meaning.

nodes.label: Typographic constraints
nodes.definition: Restraint makes every visual change an event; elegance over experiment.

nodes.label: Typography never decorative
nodes.definition: If typography changes, reality changed—not author voice.

nodes.label: Typography as evidence
nodes.definition: Rare typography functions as evidence—not emphasis.

nodes.label: Extreme typography rarity
nodes.definition: e.g. six bold words in 100 pages; many readers never notice.

nodes.label: Physics of Reading
nodes.definition: Visual changes have in-universe physical meaning; discoverable not taught.

nodes.label: The Score
nodes.definition: Master page composition document—all dimensions scored per page.

nodes.label: Resonance
nodes.definition: Central metaphor: harmony discovered not clues collected.

nodes.label: Silence not white space
nodes.definition: Terminology: Silence has rules, duration, memory, meaning.

nodes.label: Typography obeys universe
nodes.definition: No typographic choice for story convenience; physics gate.

nodes.label: Punctuation physics
nodes.definition: Punctuation marks carry rhythm and invariant counts (e.g. 17×).

nodes.label: Subconscious composition
nodes.definition: Compose for pattern-recognition system not conscious mind.

nodes.label: Seismograph page
nodes.definition: Page measures reality stress; typographic shifts = fractures.

nodes.label: Harmony not clues
nodes.definition: Truth by hearing harmony present all along—not clue collection.

nodes.label: Narrative Meter
nodes.definition: Page weight fingerprint—not word count; pulse density silence certainty gap.

nodes.label: Organic not mechanical structure
nodes.definition: Reject fixed words-per-line; rhythm emerges from story demand.

nodes.label: Two Architectures
nodes.definition: Surface (edition performance) vs Deep (survives all formats).

nodes.label: Breathing cycles
nodes.definition: 12–15 page emotional phrases; rhythm not page numbers.

nodes.label: Hidden mathematics
nodes.definition: One invisible Bach/fugue architecture—not per-line math.

nodes.label: Reader performance model
nodes.definition: Book=score; reader=performer; read 1=rehearsal; read 5=concert.

nodes.label: Reread tempo arc
nodes.definition: Same text; Adagio→Presto across reads as patterns recognized.

nodes.label: Novel completed each read
nodes.definition: Novel not complete at print; completed each time read.

nodes.label: Publication-survivable anchors
nodes.definition: Anchor to sentences/motifs/cadence—not line 14 page 37.

nodes.label: Page fingerprint
nodes.definition: Weighted attributes per page including certainty gap.

nodes.label: Two-phase production
nodes.definition: Phase 1 write story; Phase 2 compose printed artifact.

nodes.label: Composer's Pass
nodes.definition: Phase 2 orchestrates performance—not prose editing.

nodes.definition: Narrative MS (pure text) vs Performance MS (experience).

nodes.label: Page turn tool
nodes.definition: Page turn as Hitchcock edit—suspense rhythm silence.

nodes.label: Author as typesetter
nodes.definition: Typography is part of story; author owns performance design.

nodes.label: Original Score edition
nodes.definition: One canonical First Edition printing—the composed score.

nodes.label: Production vocabulary
nodes.definition: Movements not drafts; orchestration; performance design.

nodes.label: Meaning accrues late
nodes.definition: Five movements: story→character→clues→rhythm→performance.

nodes.label: Collectible typography
nodes.definition: First Edition typography as Original Score collectible.

nodes.label: Performances not score
nodes.definition: Later editions are performances; one composed score canonical.

nodes.definition: Machine that produces story—not story documentation.

nodes.definition: CHRONOFORGE ten-layer OS; CanonForge repo is live instance.

nodes.definition: Nine apex docs; never published; gate established.

nodes.definition: Per-scene tempo pulse meter cadence silence etc.

nodes.definition: Plot feelings not events—symphony of emotions.

nodes.definition: Five passes; every page maps to every pass.

nodes.definition: Track every recurring motif occurrence.

nodes.definition: Checklist proving five-pass book works fairly.

nodes.definition: BUILD-000.000 project law; sixteen articles; return when lost.

nodes.label: North Star sentence
nodes.definition: The book never changes. Only the reader does.

nodes.definition: One race human race; shared humanity beneath differences.

nodes.label: Fractured perception
nodes.definition: Novel about fractured perception not merely fractured time.

nodes.label: Experience not moral
nodes.definition: Changed perspective not lecture; experience equality don't tell it.

nodes.definition: Read 1 categorize · 2 weaken · 3 dissolve assumptions.

nodes.label: Character not group
nodes.definition: No character represents a group; every character is a human being.

nodes.definition: Silent on irrelevant identity; reader free to imagine; fair omission not trick.

nodes.definition: Leave unstated; never imply false attributes; no appearance gotcha.
